text:
# PRECEDENT LIBRARY OF PRIVATE LAW CASE MANAGEMENT DIRECTIONS AND ORDERS

PRECEDENT LIBRARY OF PRIVATE LAW CASE MANAGEMENT DIRECTIONS AND ORDERS

This document contains a comprehensive library of case management directions and orders in private law cases to be added to the standard short form template as appropriate.

IMPORTANT NOTICES	3

Penal notice	3

Child arrangements orders warnings	3

Confidentiality warnings	4

Compliance warnings	4

Right to apply	4

Special guardianship order warning	4

RECITALS	5

Covid recital	5

Legal aid recitals	5

Family Advocacy Scheme (FAS)	5

VHCC Cases (‘Events’) – Finding of Fact and Final Hearings	5

Cases where a consent order is lodged without a hearing	5

Cases that fall outside of FAS, e.g. representing a 16.4 guardian	6

Prohibition of Cross-Examination in Person Qualified Legal Representative Scheme Funding Recital	6

Without/short notice hearings	6

ISSUES	7

Domestic abuse issues	7

Parental responsibility	7

IT IS DECLARED THAT:	8

ORDERS	8

Activity directions/conditions	8

Adjournment of this hearing	9

Allocation	9

Appointment of a qualified legal representative	9

Appointment of the Official Solicitor as litigation friend	10

Additional Official Solicitor clauses	10

Assessment of litigation capacity and cognitive functioning	10

Attendance at MIAM / Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR)	12

Attendance at the next hearing	12

[Cafcass] / [CAFCASS Cymru] – Summary of oral report/advice	12

Child arrangements order	12

Child arrangements order – Spending time and contact arrangements	12

Child arrangements - directions and conditions	13

Child[ren] giving evidence	13

Children’s Guardian - Appointment - FPR rule 16.4	14

Children’s guardian’s report	15

Completion of forms to consider prevention of cross-examination in person	15

Contact at a contact centre	15

Costs	16

Cross-examination provisions (court bundle/court file)	16

Directions for fact-finding hearing	16

Direction to DWP for disclosure of party’s address	17

Disclosure of this order	17

Documents and bundles	17

Domestic abuse admissions	18

Drug/alcohol testing	18
